_schema.description: Global humanitarian aid allocation by region (x-axis column width) and sector (y-axis segment height). Fictional placeholder with realistic distributional shape. 2024 estimate. Proves the Marimekko renders before real data is substituted.

fields.columns[].label: string — full column label (used in tooltip)
fields.columns[].shortLabel: string — abbreviated label (used in chart, ≤8 chars)
fields.columns[].xShare: number — this column's share of the x-axis, 0–100. All columns must sum to 100.
fields.columns[].segments: array — the y-axis breakdown within this column. Must sum to 100.
fields.columns[].segments[].category: string — category id, must match a categories[].id
fields.columns[].segments[].value: number — this segment's share within the column, 0–100
fields.categories[].label: string — category name for legend and tooltip
fields.categories[].fill: string — hex color from hai palette
fields.xAxisLabel: string — describes what column width encodes
fields.yAxisLabel: string — describes what segment height encodes

_schema.replace: Replace columns[] with your actual x-variable groups. Replace segments[] within each column with your actual y-variable breakdown. Column xShare values must sum to 100. Segment values within each column must sum to 100.

xAxisLabel: Share of Total Humanitarian Aid Budget (column width)
